metadata.title: Money Changes Everything
metadata.album: She's So Unusual: A 30th Anniversary Celebration (Deluxe Edition)
metadata.lyrics:
[00:17.10] She said, I'm sorry, baby, I'm leaving you tonight
[00:25.07] I found someone new, he's waitin' in the car outside
[00:32.75] Ah honey, how could you do it
[00:35.93] We swore each other everlasting love
[00:41.50] She said, well yeah, I know, but when we did
[00:44.65] There was one thing we weren't really thinking of and that's money
[00:50.11] Money changes everything
[00:57.27] I said money, money changes everything
[01:05.11] We think we know what we're doin'
[01:07.96] That don't mean a thing
[01:13.58] It's all in the past now
[01:15.99] Money changes everything
[01:26.02] 
[01:32.97] They shake your hand and they smile
[01:36.20] And they buy you a drink
[01:41.13] They say, we'll be your friends
[01:43.41] We'll stick with you till the end
[01:48.91] Ah, but everybody's only looking out for themselves
[01:52.88] And you say, well, who can you trust
[02:00.40] I'll tell you, it's just nobody else's money
[02:05.85] Money changes everything
[02:12.95] I said money, money changes everything
[02:20.85] Ya think ya know what ya doin'
[02:23.55] We don't hold the strings
[02:29.29] It's all in the past now
[02:31.82] Money changes everything
[02:41.02] 
[03:03.92] Yeah, yeah, yeah
[03:21.23] Money, Money changes everything
[03:28.38] I said money, money changes everything
[03:36.13] We think we know what we're doing
[03:39.20] We don't know a thing
[03:44.82] It's all in the past now
[03:47.13] Money changes everything
[03:57.95] 
[04:03.68] Hey, yeah, yeah
[04:05.07] Money changes everything
[04:12.75] Money changes everything now
[04:20.89] Money changes everything
[04:28.73] Money changes everything
[04:44.67] Money changes everything
[04:52.46] Money
[04:52.75]
